description_long: This is a compact gelato and pastry kiosk with a whimsical, vintage-inspired design. The kiosk features a red-and-white striped canopy with scalloped edges, supported by two black vertical poles, and prominently displays the branding 'FARINARI gelateria pasticceria' along the front and sides. The main body is a rectangular cart with a white finish, a black serving counter, and a single large wheel on one side, complemented by a handle on the rear for mobility. A circular recessed area on the top right suggests a space for serving or storage, while a small, playful bunny figure sits beside the cart, adding a touch of charm. The front and rear canopy panels are adorned with ice cream and cupcake icons, reinforcing the kiosk's dessert theme. The overall structure is lightweight and portable, suitable for placement on sidewalks, parks, or urban plazas.
description: A vintage-style gelato and pastry kiosk with a red-and-white striped canopy, branded signage, and a white cart body with a serving counter and decorative bunny figure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped canopy, 'FARINARI' branding, serving counter, large wheel, and bunny figure on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded end of the cart, circular recessed area, and canopy end with dessert icons and 'FARINARI' logo.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle, wheel, and canopy, as well as the bunny figure now on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle, wheel, and canopy end with dessert icons and logo.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo on canopy front, sides, and end panels; text reads 'FARINARI gelateria pasticceria' with ice cream and cupcake icons.
attribute_roof_design: Curved, sloped canopy with red-and-white stripes, scalloped edges, and printed branding; made of fabric or vinyl.
attribute_architectural_style: Vintage-inspired with playful, retro elements and bold branding.
